ddls:
CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "time_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query started */,
  "time_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query ended */,
  "user_agent" INTEGER /* ID of the user agent that executed the query */,
  "sql_statement" INTEGER /* ID of the SQL statement that was executed */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the query was successful */,
  "error_cause" INTEGER /* ID of the error cause if the query failed */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that executed the query */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database where the query was executed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the query was executed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the query execution */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of the query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_error_cause FOREIGN KEY ("error_cause") REFERENCES error_causes ("error_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_sql_statement FOREIGN KEY ("sql_statement") REFERENCES sql_statements ("sql_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_user_agent FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent") REFERENCES user_agents ("user_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "user_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the user agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user agent */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the user agent */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user agent is active */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user agent was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sql_statements" (
  "sql_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SQL statement */,
  "sql_text" TEXT /* The text of the SQL statement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SQL statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SQL statement was first logged */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of the SQL statement (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the SQL statement contains sensitive information */,
  "execution_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the SQL statement has been executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sql_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_causes" (
  "error_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error cause */,
  "error_cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the error cause */,
  "is_severe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error is severe */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action for resolving the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the query in MB */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during query execution */,
  "io_usage" REAL /* I/O usage during query execution */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency for the query */,
  "query_plan" TEXT /* Query execution plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_performance_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES query_logs ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., DBA, developer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the query logs */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES query_logs ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, security) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES query_logs ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "is_notified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipient has been notified */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is confidential */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_queries" (
  "report_query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report query */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "sql_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SQL statement used in the report */,
  "execution_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the query has been used in reports */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use in a report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_queries_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_queries_sql_id FOREIGN KEY ("sql_id") REFERENCES sql_statements ("sql_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
